---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "A not-so-actively maintained collection of thoughts and experiences."
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

<!-- ::: {.mb-4}
Blog goes here.
::: -->

<br>
